steps.title: Identify the relevant information to include
steps.content: The goal is to indicate the SIZE of the Pearl Harbor NWR. The notes provide one specific size measurement: “61 acres”—this is the detail that accomplishes the stated objective.

steps.title: Match the relevant detail to the choices
steps.content: Choice A includes “encompasses 61 acres,” directly accomplishing the stated goal. The other three omit the size measurement, focusing instead on management, species, or other unrelated details. That matches choice A — A is correct.
